positive: A whimsical, highly stylized illustration of a friendly forest animal community—a sloth, a fox, and an owl—engaged in a picnic under a glowing bioluminescent canopy. The style is modern vector art mixed with detailed linework, featuring clean silhouettes and bold, saturated colors (deep emerald, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and creamy ivory). The composition is perfectly centered, showcasing the animals interacting naturally on a stylized picnic blanket. Use high-contrast lighting with glowing edges (rim lighting) emphasizing the shapes and making it immediately print-ready. Intricate yet simple background elements like oversized, stylized flora and constellations, suitable for a T-shirt or hoodie print. Perfect for commercial apparel use.
negative: blurry, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logo, noisy, low detail, worst quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, cropped, jpeg artifacts, realistic photo
